channel.title: Authentication Tokens on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Authentication Tokens on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: ACR Stealer: Two observed intrusion chains amid increased threat activity
item.description:
Microsoft Defender Experts observed increased ACR Stealer activity from late April to mid-June 2026 across customer environments. The campaigns used ClickFix lures to steal browser credentials, authentication tokens, and sensitive documents from enterprise environments.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
